pageContext.name: Simikiel: Sword of Absolution
pageContext.description: Sideshow Art Prints presents the Simikiel: Sword of Absolution Fine Art Print, a fantasy art design by artist Peter Mohrbacher. Part of his original Angelarium series, this powerful portrait honors a sword-bearing Seraphim who represents retribution.  From the mind of Peter Mohrbacher, the Angelarium project has grown into an artistic anthology of designs inspired by numerous named angels throughout mythology. The Seraphim are heavenly manifestations of earthly beliefs, and Simikiel is the Angel of Vengeance who is said to deal punishment to the wicked. This otherworldly illustration invokes awe, showing Simikiel's unknowable visage, his double-edged sword, and his exposed heart as indication of his influence and power. Cool tones permeate the image, creating a sense of detachment and indifference as the Seraphim is called upon to dispense judgment.  This divine image of devastation is now being offered to fans in a high-end, museum quality print format for the first time in collaboration with Sideshow Art Prints. Each Simikiel: Sword of Absolution Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Angelarium series logo as a part of the limited edition of 250 pieces. Available as an unframed giclée and in a custom framed presentation, this angelic fantasy artwork makes a truly unique addition to any collection, especially alongside other Angelarium art prints.  Strike at your enemies and add the Simikiel: Sword of Absolution Fine Art Print by Peter Mohrbacher to your collection today!
